name: Thai Curry Paste
recipeIngredient: 2 tbsp chopped fresh lemon grass (use bottom 2 inches of stems only)
recipeInstructions:
RED CURRY PASTE: Combine the first seven ingredients in a blender at medium speed until coarse ground. In a mortar, combine chili, salt, and blended spices, grinding to paste with a pestle. Add water and grind until well mixed.
Green Curry Paste: Prepare as above but substitute fresh green serrano chilis for red chilis, fresh makrood for dried, and fresh laos root for dried.
Notes:
Authentic traditional Thai red chili is prepared by cutting open 6 dried chilis and removing the seeds. Soak the pods in water for 30 minutes, drain, and squeeze out the excess water. 2 tbsp chili powder can be substituted for fresh chilis. The Tuong Ot Sriracha chili sauce mentioned in a previous missive will also work well.
